relations.subject: Montane racket-tail
relations.evidence: It inhabits tropical moist Montane Forests at elevations of 700–2,900 meters above sea level and is known to visit cultivated areas. The IUCN has assessed this bird as near threatened, with its population estimated at 1,500 to 7,000 mature individuals

relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Montane racket-tail
relations.evidence: It faces threats from habitat loss and the cage bird trade
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
